tweets.topic: Jio launches ₹459 Youth Gaming Plan with 2GB daily data and OTT access
tweets.tweet: Jio just dropped a ₹459 Youth Gaming Plan with 2GB daily data and OTT bundle—perfect for students who want gaming without burning their wallet. Finally, a plan that gets what young gamers actually need! #JioGaming #IndianTech

tweets.topic: OnePlus Nord CE 6 Lite launches in India on May 7
tweets.tweet: OnePlus Nord CE 6 Lite launches May 7 in India with expected pricing around ₹20,000 for the base variant. Perfect timing if you're hunting for a solid mid-range phone without burning a hole in your pocket! #OnePlusNord #IndiaLaunch

tweets.topic: Vivo X300 Ultra India launch on May 6
tweets.tweet: Vivo X300 Ultra launches in India on May 6 with a flagship chip and 50MP camera setup. Finally getting that premium phone without emptying your wallet completely! 📱 #VivoX300Ultra #IndiaLaunch

tweets.topic: HMD Vibe 2 launching in India next month via Flipkart
tweets.tweet: HMD Vibe 2 is landing in India next month exclusively on Flipkart with specs that'll make budget phone hunters actually excited. Finally, a fresh challenger in the affordable segment that doesn't feel like you're settling for less. #HMDVibe2 #BudgetPhones

tweets.topic: OPPO Find X9 Ultra and Find X9s premium smartphones launched in India
tweets.tweet: OPPO just dropped the Find X9 Ultra and X9s in India with 50MP cameras and Snapdragon 8 Elite processors—premium flagships ready to compete. Time for camera enthusiasts to finally have some serious alternatives that won't completely drain your wallet. #OPPOIndia #FindX9

tweets.topic: vivo T5 Pro with 9020 mAh battery launched with Snapdragon processor
tweets.tweet: Vivo T5 Pro just dropped with a beefy 9020 mAh battery and Snapdragon processor for solid everyday performance. This means your phone finally won't cry for a charger by 6 PM. #VivoT5Pro #BatteryLife

tweets.topic: WhatsApp bans 9,400 accounts linked to digital arrest scams in India
tweets.tweet: WhatsApp has banned 9,400 accounts involved in digital arrest scams targeting Indian users in recent months. Good news for our inboxes—stay alert and never pay anyone claiming to be from law enforcement over chat. #CyberSafety #StaySmart

tweets.topic: Amazon expands quick commerce service to 100 cities across India
tweets.tweet: Amazon's quick commerce now reaches 100 Indian cities, aiming to deliver groceries in 10-15 minutes with same-day options. So your midnight snack cravings finally have a legal way to happen without raiding the neighbor's kitchen! #QuickCommerce #AmazonIndia

tweets.topic: Google Wallet adds Aadhaar Digital ID support in India
tweets.tweet: Google Wallet now supports Aadhaar Digital ID in India, making your identity verification super convenient on your phone. No more juggling multiple apps to prove you're you—just one tap away! #GoogleWallet #DigitalIndia

tweets.topic: Nothing launches Essential Voice AI-powered speech-to-text app
tweets.tweet: Nothing just dropped Essential, their AI-powered speech-to-text app that turns your voice into text in real-time. Finally, a solid Indian alternative to expensive transcription tools—could save creators and professionals some serious ₹ monthly. #NothingTech #AIindia
